mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, author, price, publisher, isbn, category_id, total_stock, stock, publish_date, description, create_time FROM book
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book b
AND b.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
AND b.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{publisher}, '%')
AND b.category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.author, b.price, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.total_stock, b.stock, b.publish_date, b.description, b.create_time, c.name AS category_name FROM book b LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (name, author, price, publisher, isbn, category_id, total_stock, stock, publish_date, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{author}, #{price}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{categoryId}, #{totalStock}, #{stock}, #{publishDate}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND stock > 0
UPDATE book SET stock = stock + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND stock < total_stock
